key_interfaces.name: run_doctor
key_interfaces.description: Check all dependencies (uv, python3, zellij, claude, zchat-channel, ergo, weechat, plugin) and report status with version info

key_interfaces.name: setup_weechat
key_interfaces.description: Download and install WeeChat zchat plugin from GitHub to autoload directory

key_interfaces.name: _check_command
key_interfaces.description: Check if command exists on PATH and return (found, version_string)

key_interfaces.name: _weechat_autoload_dir
key_interfaces.description: Find WeeChat python autoload directory from known locations

key_interfaces.name: _weechat_plugin_installed
key_interfaces.description: Return path to installed zchat.py WeeChat plugin or None

user_flows.name: run diagnostics
steps: iterate dependency list (uv, python3, zellij, claude, zchat-channel, ergo, weechat)
check each via shutil.which + version command
show project list and active project
show update status from update module
summarize required/optional counts, exit 1 if required missing

user_flows.name: setup weechat plugin
steps: prompt for overwrite if plugin exists (unless --force)
download zchat.py from GitHub raw URL
